title: inputbooster api
description: Official API library for InputBooster mods
body:
# InputBooster API

Official developer API library for mods that want to integrate with [InputBooster](https://modrinth.com/mod/inputbooster).

---

## What Is This?

InputBooster API gives mod developers programmatic access to InputBooster through a stable, versioned interface. Build mods that react to input events, read live stats, control features, and manage profiles — without touching InputBooster's internal code.

---

## What Developers Can Do

- Read live stats such as poll rate, FPS, CPS, input latency, and recovered inputs
- Control the mod by toggling active state, changing Hz, and switching AUTO or MANUAL mode
- Listen to real-time events including attacks queued, burst mode activation, profile switches, and CPS blocks
- Manage config profiles by saving, loading, and listing them programmatically
- Use it as either a required or optional dependency depending on your needs

---

## For Players

You do not need to install this manually. If a mod you downloaded requires it, your launcher such as Prism, ATLauncher, or the Modrinth App will install it automatically.

---

## Stability Promise

The API interface is designed to stay stable across InputBooster updates. Mods built against this library will not break just because InputBooster updates internally. Only additive changes are made between minor versions.

---
